dct_title_s:
Carte de l'Isle Madagascar dite autrement Madecaſe et de S. Laurens et
          aujordhui L'Isle Dauphine auecque les costes de Cofala et du Mozambique en Afrique
dct_alternative_sm: Map of Madagascar ... and the coast of Mozambique
dct_description_sm:
Illustrates "sea routes from the west coast of Africa to Mozambique and from Fort
        Dauphin on the southeast coast of Madagascar to the north, south, and to the east, to India,
        Surate and Malacca."
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
